name: Payroll/Ops Mandate
target_user: Ops automation that sends recurring fixed payouts.
use_case: Scheduled payouts to known recipients without raw treasury key exposure.
risk_model: High interval spacing, explicit recipient allowlist, long expiry only when operationally needed.
allowed_destination_model: Recipient token accounts approved by the owner.
revoke_behavior: Owner revokes after payout cycle or recipient change.
verifier_notes: Receipt proves whether funds moved and which rule applied.
